subject: Add ml-prediction-ms with basic build infrastruct.
commit_message:
Add ml-prediction-ms with basic build infrastruct.

Added offline training code, along with ml slice prediction model, The main ml-prediction-ms component code changes are added to perform prediction on single slice.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3067
Signed-off-by: sendil kumar Jaya kumar <sendil.kumar@wipro.com>
Change-Id: Ia2e50dcbd97d03a96884a2bf5417edbf2fa04b4a

Patch Set 34: Code-Review-2

(1 comment)

I appreciate what you've been trying to do with your changes. However, you should not ever pollute your running code with tests like

if self.IsUnitTest == True:

and doing something different within the running code.

Instead, the pytest Test modules needs to use mocks or fakes for the items that try invoking remote resources. Which call is it that is taking a long time to time out? You need to use the mock library to replace that function invocation with one that does what is needed quickly and returns fake data.

If you need help with how to use mocks and fakes, let us know. We can point you to sample code that uses them
